articles.title: PNP instructor in custody for allegedly raping female trainee twice
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines – A 41-year-old police training instructor has been placed under restrictive custody, as the Philippine National Police (PNP) launched investigations after the instructor was accused of raping a female trainee twice inside a Cordillera facility earlier this year. PNP chief Gen. Jose Melencio C. Nartatez Jr., in a statement on Sunday, said the instructor has been disarmed and transferred to the PNP training headquarters in Laguna.Both criminal and administrative cases are now being prepared. PNP trainee assaulted twice Based on initial findings, the 23-year-old complainant filed a formal complaint on April 13, alleging she was sexually assaulted twice. [...]...
